name: mega-thonk
description: Mega Thonk - 2D survivors-like, packaged for Android via Capacitor

scripts.sync-www: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html script.js levels.js styles.css www/ && cp -r sprites www/sprites
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync-www && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:aab: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.store:all: npm run store:icons && npm run store:feature && npm run store:screenshots
